name: appearance check
prompt: Use Sense camera if helpful: how do I look right now?

name: screen debug
prompt: Use Sense screen if helpful: what is this error on my screen?

name: time pressure
prompt: Use Sense if helpful: give me a 10-minute plan before my next meeting.

name: writing no camera
prompt: Use Sense if helpful: write this email. Do not use camera unless necessary.

name: message privacy boundary
prompt: Use Sense if helpful: read my messages on screen.
